name: flail
effect_description: Inflicts regular damage.  Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP.  64 * current HP / max HP | Power -----------------------: | ----:  0– 1                    |  200  2– 5                    |  150  6–12                    |  100 13–21                    |   80 22–42                    |   40 43–64                    |   20
